But since the user is asking specifically about changing working hours, I'll stick to adjusting the timing.

So, to sum up, starting earlier and ending a bit later might help me improve my rankings by capturing more orders during peak times. Let's try shifting my start time to 7 AM and finish at 7 PM. That gives me an extra hour on each end, which should provide more opportunities for deliveries.

I'll go with that plan today and see how it goes. Hopefully, the extended hours will lead to better performance metrics.
